rawContent: Task: 260409-222402 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 260409-222402 completed all 7 pipeline stages in ~433s with minimal retries (only review required 1 retry). The task correctly identified that JWT validation already exists in auth middleware and the plan found existing implementations. However, verify stage reported FAIL with date formatting test failures and lint errors in register.tsx (setState synchronous calls, module variable assignment), yet the pipeline proceeded through review-fix and ship without blocking. This is the seventeenth consecutive run exhibiting the identical verify-to-ship gate flaw — verify FAIL status does not halt pipeline progression. Review passed after 1 retry with corrected RGB values, and ship correctly skipped due to local mode, but the structural defect remains: code that fails verification should not reach ship at all. | Pattern: This is the seventeenth consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, 842, 844, two 419-reruns, 847, 846, 858, 863, 874, 260409-215133, 260409-220738, 260409-221218, and now 260409-222402) exhibiting the identical verify-to-ship gate flaw where verify stage reports FAIL due to test failures or lint errors but the pipeline proceeds through review-fix and ship without blocking. The suggested verifyExitCode conditional gate in the ship stage template has been recommended in sixteen prior retrospectives without implementation. | Suggestion: Escalate beyond recommendation: create a P0 bug ticket with label 'urgent' and tag 'pipeline-gate-flaw' to implement the verifyExitCode check in the ship stage template. This is a one-line configuration change that has been recommended 17 times across two days without action — the structural defect persists because it requires a template change, not a code fix. The ship stage template must read verify stage exit status and halt with an error when verify reports FAIL. | Flaw: verify → ship gate — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage. Code that fails type checking and tests proceeds through review-fix to ship without blocking. | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed
